evidence_rea: shall not document the effort using the Impact Assessment template provided by the Office of Responsible AI.
evidence_reg: The Provider SHALL provide information that is relevant to explain the high-risk AI system's output where applicable, and describe the technical capabilities and characteristics of the high-risk AI system.
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: REA prohibits using a specific impact assessment template, while REG-073 mandates providing explanatory information; different actions/objects and no direct conflict.

evidence_rea: shall not document the effort using the Impact Assessment template provided by the Office of Responsible AI.
evidence_reg: The Developer SHALL take into account the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system when appropriate, specifying for the input data, or any other relevant information in terms of the training, validation and testing data sets used;
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: REA concerns prohibiting a documentation template; REG-075 requires considering intended purpose and specifying data details; they address different requirements.

evidence_rea: shall not document the effort using the Impact Assessment template provided by the Office of Responsible AI.
evidence_reg: The Deployer SHALL accompany high-risk AI systems with instructions for use in an appropriate digital format or otherwise that include concise, complete, correct and clear information that is relevant, accessible and comprehensible to deployers.
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: REA prohibits a specific documentation template; REG-066 mandates accompanying systems with instructions; different actions/objects.

evidence_rea: shall not document the effort using the Impact Assessment template provided by the Office of Responsible AI.
evidence_reg: The Organization SHALL establish, implement, document, and maintain a risk management system in relation to high-risk AI systems.
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: REG-005 requires documenting a risk management system; REA forbids using a particular impact assessment template for “the effort.” Different objects and no conflicting mandate on template use.

evidence_rea: shall not document the effort using the Impact Assessment template provided by the Office of Responsible AI.
evidence_reg: Testing shall be carried out against prior defined metrics and probabilistic thresholds that are appropriate to the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: REA addresses documentation template prohibition; REG-022 sets testing criteria; unrelated actions/objects with no direct conflict.
